title: Jr. AI Engineer (GenAI / Hyperscaler / Agentic AI)
company_focus:
AI solutions provider transforming businesses with
intelligent systems
description:
Unlock Your Future with Nexaminds!

At Nexaminds, we're on a mission to redefine industries with
AI. We're passionate about the limitless potential of
artificial intelligence to transform businesses, streamline
processes, and drive growth.

Join us on our visionary journey. We're leading the way in
AI solutions, and we're committed to innovation,
collaboration, and ethical practices. Become a part of our
team and shape the future powered by intelligent machines.
If you're driven by ambition, success, fun, and learning,
Nexaminds is where you belong.



We are seeking a skilled AI Engineer with strong experience
in Generative AI, Hyperscaler AI services, and Agentic AI
systems. The ideal candidate will have hands-on expertise in
building LLM-based use cases, backend AI integrations, and
deploying scalable AI solutions on AWS and Azure platforms.

Key Responsibilities

- Design and develop GenAI and Agentic AI solutions using
  modern LLM frameworks.
- Build and implement real-world use cases leveraging LLMs
  such as Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, AWS Nova, and
  Meta Llama.
- Develop backend tools and services to support AI-driven
  applications.
- Work with AWS Bedrock and SageMaker for model deployment,
  orchestration, and optimization.
- Utilize Azure AI Foundry services for AI solution
  development on Azure.
- Implement Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines
  using Vector Databases and embeddings.
- Perform fine-tuning and optimization of foundation models.
- Manage token usage, prompt engineering, and context
  optimization for LLM applications.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to translate
  business requirements into AI solutions.
- Ensure scalability, performance, and security of AI systems
  in production environments.

Required Skills

- 2+ years of software/AI engineering experience with
  GenAI/LLM space.
- Strong hands-on experience with MCP, Agentic AI concepts,
  and LLM application development.
- Experience with AWS AI stack: Bedrock, SageMaker.
- Experience with Azure AI Foundry or equivalent Azure AI
  services.
- Practical exposure to LLMs: Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini,
  AWS Nova, Meta Llama.
- Solid understanding of Vector Databases, embeddings, token
  management, and RAG architectures.
- Experience in fine-tuning foundation models.
- Proficiency in Python and backend development.
- Familiarity with REST APIs, microservices, and cloud-native
  architectures.
- Good understanding of MLOps and CI/CD for AI workloads.
- Must possess an innovative mindset with a proactive problem-
  solving approach.

Preferred Qualifications

- Experience building production-grade GenAI applications.
- Knowledge of prompt engineering and evaluation frameworks.
- Exposure to multi-agent or autonomous AI systems.
- Experience with Kubernetes/Docker is a plus.
- Strong problem-solving and communication skills.



What you can expect from us

Here at Nexaminds, we're not your typical workplace. We're
all about creating a friendly and trusting environment where
you can thrive. Why does this matter? Well, trust and
openness lead to better quality, innovation, commitment to
getting the job done, efficiency, and cost-effectiveness.

- Stock options 📈
- Remote work options 🏠
- Flexible working hours 🕜
- Benefits above the law
- But it's not just about the work; it's about the people too.
  You'll be collaborating with some seriously awesome IT
  pros.
- You'll have access to mentorship and tons of opportunities
  to learn and level up.

Ready to embark on this journey with us? 🚀🎉 If you're
feeling the excitement, go ahead and apply!

ai_classification_reasoning:
This role is hands-on with building, fine-tuning, and
deploying LLM-based systems including RAG pipelines and
Agentic AI. The engineer directly works with foundation
models, implements AI solutions, and deploys them on
hyperscaler platforms.
